media_title: Maid Marian and Her Merry Men

characters.name: Barrington
characters.description: BarringtonFull NameBarringtonFirst AppearanceHow The Band Got TogetherLast AppearanceVoyage To The Bottom Of The ForestFriends/AlliesMaid Marian,Robin Hood,Rabies,Little Ron,Snooker,GladysEnemiesKing John,The Sheriff,Gary,Graeme,Guy of Gisborne,Rotten Rose,MuchLikesSinging, sleepingDislikesInstitutional injusticeActor/ActressDanny John-Jules Barringtonwas one of the Merry men and also a Rastafarian with his accent and trademark rainbow hat. He first appears making a living in Worksop selling rats, untillthe Sheriffarrested him for selling a rat past its sell by date and held him along withRabiesat Nottingham Castle where they were both tied to a torture machine.

characters.name: Gary
characters.description: Template:InfoboxGaryis one ofKing John's faithful, but dimwitted Norman guards and also one ofThe Sheriff of Nottingham's henchmen. He is often seen taking part in many of his masters' cruel schemes to make the people of Worksop miserable. His Best friend isGraemewho is the other guard and call themselves "bestest mates". He was first seen with Graeme helping the Sheriif rob the poor people of Worksop and arrestBarringtonandRabiesfor breaking the the law and take them to Nottingham Castle to be tortured.
characters.media_title: Maid Marian and Her Merry Men

characters.name: King John

characters.name: Little Ron
characters.description: Template:Infobox Little Ronis one ofMaid Marian's Merry Men. He started off as an ordinary peasant trying to pick fights with passers by on the bridge. He joined the Merry Men when he first met Marian who was holding a wimpish tailor calledRobinhostage and carrying him to Sherwood Forest. He was standing on a bridge with his trust quarterstaff challenging them to a fight.
characters.media_title: Maid Marian and Her Merry Men

characters.name: Maid Marian
characters.description: Maid MarianFull NameMaid MarianFirst AppearanceHow The Band Got TogetherLast AppearanceVoyage To The Bottom Of The ForestFriends/AlliesRobin Hood,Barrington,Rabies,Little Ron,Snooker,GladysEnemiesKing John,The Sheriff,Gary,Graeme,Guy of Gisborne,Rotten Rose,MuchLikesJustice, adventure, archery, singingDislikesInjustice, cruelty, Rose's devious tricks, Sexism, her men's incompetenceActor/ActressKate Lonergan Maid Marianis main heroine and the leader of the merry men. She started off as a poor peasant girl trying to sell her tadpole called Edwina, but was ordered to be killed bythe Sheriff of Nottinghamafter humiliating him by his two guardsGaryandGraeme.

characters.name: Robin Hood
characters.description: Robin HoodFull NameRobin of KensingtonFirst AppearanceHow The Band Got TogetherLast AppearanceVoyage To The Bottom Of The ForestFriends/AlliesMaid Marian,Barrington,Rabies,Little Ron,Snooker,GladysEnemiesKing John,The Sheriff,Gary,Graeme,Guy of Gisborne,Rotten Rose,MuchLikesFashion, singingDislikesDanger, embarrassmentActor/ActressWayne Morris Robin Hood(Robin of Kensington) is one ofMaid Marian's merry men and second in command. He was a poor tailor from Kensington who made clothes for important people includingKing John. He joined Marian's band after she took him hostage and threatenedthe Sheriffthat she would burn King John's new underpants.
